Name: Supabase auth trigger for auto-creating profiles
Description: Create a Supabase database trigger that fires on auth.users INSERT and creates a profiles row with defaults (tier='free', onboarded=false, role='photographer'). File: supabase/migrations/20260328000000_profile_trigger.sql.

Name: Set up Resend SDK + email send utility
Description: Create src/lib/email/send.ts — import Resend, initialize with RESEND_API_KEY, export sendEmail(to, subject, html). Add RESEND_API_KEY to Vercel.

Name: Build Welcome email template
Description: Create src/lib/email/templates/Welcome.tsx using react-email. View1 Sort branding, welcome message, CTA to dashboard. Wire into signup flow.

Name: Build Gallery Invitation email template
Description: Create src/lib/email/templates/GalleryInvitation.tsx — project name, photographer name, CTA button with gallery link + access token.

Name: Build Payment Confirmation email template
Description: Create src/lib/email/templates/PaymentConfirmation.tsx — amount, project name, download link. Wire into Stripe webhook (checkout.session.completed).

Name: Wire publish flow to Supabase
Description: Make Publish button update projects.status='published' + published_at=now(). Generate gallery URL /gallery/{projectId}. Show success with copyable link.

Name: Build gallery invite API endpoint
Description: Create POST /api/gallery/[id]/invite — accepts {email}. Creates gallery_access row with token, sends GalleryInvitation email via Resend.

Name: Wire invite button on publish page
Description: Wire email input + Send Magic Link button to POST /api/gallery/[id]/invite. Show success toast.

Name: Build Cloudflare Images upload handler
Description: Create upload function in src/lib/cloudflare.ts. Push to Cloudflare Images API after Supabase Storage upload. Update media row with cloudflare_image_id and thumbnail_url.

Name: Wire Cloudflare upload into media upload flow
Description: After Supabase Storage upload success, trigger Cloudflare upload. Update media row with URLs. Gallery/workspace display real thumbnails.

Name: Implement watermark overlay via Cloudflare variants
Description: Configure Cloudflare variants: public (full), thumbnail (400px), watermark (PROOF overlay). Gallery serves watermark for preview-tier.

Name: Wire account settings to Supabase update
Description: Settings page form saves display_name, avatar_url to profiles table. Show success toast.

Name: Wire gallery theme selection to persist
Description: Theme selection in project settings updates projects.gallery_theme. Gallery page reads and applies correct theme.

Name: Wire pricing configuration to persist
Description: Pricing model, flat_fee_cents, per_photo_cents save to projects table on Save Configuration click.

Name: Build ZIP export API route
Description: Create GET /api/gallery/[id]/export — validates access, generates ZIP by category folders using JSZip. Wire export page button.

Name: Implement batch rename template engine
Description: src/lib/utils/rename.ts expandTemplate() replaces {project} {category} {n} {date} tokens. Bulk update media.display_name.

Name: Enforce free tier project limit
Description: Check tier on project creation. Free tier >= 3 projects → block with upgrade prompt.

Name: Handle Stripe Connect pending state
Description: Settings/connect page checks ?connected=pending param. Shows 'Complete your Stripe setup' banner.

Name: Wire real notification inserts on key events
Description: Create src/lib/notifications.ts. Insert notifications on payment received, gallery invite, project published, upload complete.

Name: End-to-end smoke test
Description: MANUAL: signup → onboard → upload → AI sort → pricing → publish → invite → client views → client pays → downloads. Document failures.
